commands.repair_reason: Contributor real-OAuth proof and maintainer design/rebase review are required; automation should not repair a PR whose merge gate is missing contributor environment evidence.; Needs attention: The diff adds no supply-chain surface, but the proposed cache can cross runtime data boundaries unless it is scoped to all provider usage context inputs.; Review finding: [P2] Preserve loader context before caching — src/infra... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a configurable in-memory TTL cache for provider usage summaries, updates usage config schema/help/labels/types, and adds focused provider-usage cache tests.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes at source level: current main status/gateway paths call loadProviderUsageSummary and Anthropic usage fetching performs a live OAuth usage request; I did not reproduce a live 429 in a real OAuth setup.
commands.review_followup: Contributor real-OAuth proof and maintainer design/rebase review are required; automation should not repair a PR whose merge gate is missing contributor environment evidence.

target.title: usage: add cache TTL for loadProviderUsageSummary (fix #45332)
